payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Three-seat dark brown leather couch with padded, stitched cushions and a tufted back; visible reclining seams and wide padded armrests; mostly visible in the crop with a slight left-edge cut-off; appears to be approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.
